title: New Music Disc
description: This mod add 8 music disc. The song was created by Minecraft Fan on Youtube
body:
### This mod add 8 new music disc.
You can get the music disc by the vanilla way.

Listen to good music with new feeling.

Minecraft Fan created all of them.
Each disc has their author name in game

### Credits (Music):
- T_en_M
> [Shrieker](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kAOY8SWSphc)
>
> [The Wither](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E_bClOgwALY)
>
> [Forest](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HVAEfCX7GxU)
- AlexChocho
> [Emerald Melody](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZfvI_MWDmSA)
>
> [Amethyst Melody](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VQufKhzlhGY)
- Nameless Guy
> [Time](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7yJ36XaFD-w)
- JamiesName
> [Shulk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UXR9QgaMbjw)
- Bling Bling Cheese
> [Fort-stress](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mO2oCKKsWK8)
